parsed.production_notes: The video uses AI-generated watercolor-style imagery. The animation is limited to unnatural mouth movements and slight head bobs, typical of image-to-video AI tools, and the background in the first scene is completely static.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, brown complexion, dark curly shoulder-length hair.
characters.wardrobe: Scene 1: grey striped dress. Scene 2: light blue jacket, white collared shirt, dark blue skirt.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion, brown shoulder-length hair.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue jacket over a white shirt and a blue skirt.

scenes.setting: Cozy cafe or study room, daytime, bookshelves, record player, teacups, warm color palette.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two women are seated across from each other at a small round cafe table with teacups on it. The woman on the left has dark curly hair and wears a grey striped dress. The woman on the right has brown hair and wears a light blue jacket. They are in a cozy room filled with tall bookshelves, a record player, and framed pictures. The art style is a detailed watercolor illustration. The lighting is warm and soft, creating an inviting atmosphere.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a watercolor illustration of two women talking at a cafe table. Text bubbles appear on screen as they speak, simulating a conversation. A flag and app name are visible at the top of the frame. The camera remains static throughout the scene. The overall composition resembles a stylized comic panel.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Your English sounds so natural lately!
Character A says: I finally stopped just 'studying' and started talking.
Character B says: Did you find a private tutor?
Character A says: No, I just use Fluently for 10 minutes a day.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇺🇸 Easy English A2 🎧
Your English sounds so natural lately!
I finally stopped just 'studying'
and started talking
Did you find a private tutor?
No, I just use Fluently for 10 minutes a day

scenes.setting: Abstract watercolor background, light beige tones.

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman with dark curly hair stands facing the camera against a plain, light beige watercolor background. She is wearing a light blue buttonless jacket over a white collared shirt and a dark blue skirt. Her hands are clasped in front of her initially, then she gestures slightly. The art style remains a watercolor illustration. The lighting is even and bright.

scenes.visual_description: The woman from the previous scene, now in a different outfit, speaks directly to the camera. She is centered in the frame against a minimal background. Text overlays appear on screen highlighting her key points as she speaks. The animation is limited mostly to her facial features. The shot feels like a direct address to the viewer.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Just 10 minutes a day with Fluently is all it takes.
Character A says: In Week 1, you lose the fear of mistakes.
Character A says: In Week 2, you start thinking in English.
Character A says: In Week 4, you're having full confident conversations!
Character A says: Stop 'studying' and start actually talking.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark purple gradient background with no characters, props, or distinct features. The lighting is a simple radial gradient from the center. The scene is entirely static and abstract. It serves as a blank canvas for graphic elements. The overall tone is dark and clean.

scenes.visual_description: A dark purple gradient background fills the screen. The app logo, name, and a tagline appear in the center. A download button is displayed at the bottom. The elements animate slightly as they appear. The scene functions as a standard promotional end card.
